channel.title: LLM Timeline — CMU Models
channel.description: Large Language Model releases from CMU.

item.title: Bi-Mamba (CMU)
item.description: Parameters: Bi-Mamba License: closed Type: model Unreleased, but will be replicated. "a scalable and powerful 1-bit Mamba architecture designed for more efficient large language models"

item.title: Mamba-2 (CMU)
item.description: Parameters: Mamba-2 License: open Type: model Analysis: https://tridao.me/blog/2024/mamba2-part1-model/

item.title: Mamba (CMU)
item.description: Parameters: Mamba License: open Type: model The Pile, new arch beyond just Transformers. 2.7B MMLU=26.2. 7B MMLU=33.3.
